title: Henry Zeffman: What does Keir Starmer do next after Andy Burnham's Makerfield win?
description: Discussion about the prime minister's future ramps up after Makerfield by-election.

title: Boy, 3, hurt at zoo was attacked by a crocodile
description: Police say a man arrested on suspicion of attempted murder has been bailed.

title: 'Neither I nor Italy ever beg': Meloni says Trump made up story about photo
description: The highly public exchange is an indication that their earlier close ties have frayed since Trump's decision to go to war with Iran.

title: Historic by-election win sends message to Labour and SNP, says Badenoch
description: Kemi Badenoch hailed the Scottish Conservatives' first by-election win since 1973, after the party took Aberdeen South from the SNP.

title: Amber extreme heat warning issued as 35C heatwave approaches
description: Temperatures are expected to peak in the mid-30s Celsius on Monday and Tuesday with impacts on health and a risk of disruption to travel.

title: Police officer was set on fire during Ely riots, court told
description: The deaths of teenagers Kyrees Sullivan and Harvey Evans sparked a night of violence in Cardiff in 2023.

title: Thousands of HGV drivers given bogus medical tests in the back of vans
description: Trading Standards said Doctors on Wheels promised tests for "just under £60" undercutting competitors.

title: Rapist who 'catfished' Muslim men on Snapchat and Grindr jailed
description: Police now believe Waleed Saeed had dozens more victims, who they are now appealing to come forward.
